tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text: You've got to tell your OpenClaw to implement it to replace crons and subgents to the extent it can. That's the best hack I am using myself for now, but hopefully can get this fixed with better plugin APIs soon

tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text:
I'm still trying to figure out how to get native OpenClaw subagents to run as a minion (PR coming, might need OC core maintainer help) but for now all deterministic jobs can come over.

This was my PR that wasn't taken but I get they want to keep Core clean with minimal new arch

tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text: GBrain v0.14 now has a jobs server for OpenClaw that significantly increases throughput and reduces gateway load, based on proven patterns from BullMQ. https://t.co/Nd11e6gDUR

tweets.name: Venture Twins

tweets.name: Venture Twins
tweets.text:
To be clear - I think the vast majority of doctors are great. 

But most don't feel good about the amount of time they get to spend with patients + how long it takes them to get appointments.

I hope AI can make doctor < -- > patient time more effective + efficient!

tweets.name: Venture Twins
tweets.text:
Doctor doesn’t like patients using AI because they come prepared with harder questions and he can’t “coast” anymore 🫠

This is a tough watch.

From a patient perspective - it’s never been harder to get a 15 minute appointment with a doctor. Why not come educated? https://t.co/M7nf8KqmxO
